title: bromopsis erecta subsp. stenophylla
intro: Bromopsis erecta subsp. stenophylla, also known as Rocky Mountain bent or slender bent grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in herbal remedies to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms associated with colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Bromopsis erecta subsp. stenophylla include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to support respiratory health and promote relief from congestion and coughs.
